title: Finding Presentation Framework
when_to_use: When presenting results to client audiences

steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Open presentation with business impact statement capturing attention immediately
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for finding presentation framework
steps.expected_output: Compelling opening slide focused on financial or operational risk

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Present attack chain visually showing progression from access to impact
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: Visual diagram demonstrating attack flow and compromised systems

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Demonstrate vulnerability live with screen recording or recorded demo
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Video demonstration showing vulnerability exploitation clearly

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Frame all technical details in business context and strategic impact
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Risk communication translated to business terms and decision-making factors

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Provide specific remediation with clear timeline and resource requirements
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Actionable remediation plan with realistic implementation schedule

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Close presentation emphasizing security improvements and partnership
steps.expected_output: Positive conclusion reinforcing collaborative security improvement approach

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Prepare for difficult questions with detailed technical knowledge and client awareness
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Confidence and credibility demonstrated through thorough preparation
